title: ANC - Change ANC Mode value (Adaptive/Standard)
scenario: Verify that the ANC mode persists correctly when toggling between Adaptive and Standard after closing and reopening the ANC settings tab.
steps: Start the app on an ANC-supported device.
Close and reopen the ANC tab.
Check that the ANC mode remains at the selected value.
expected: The ANC mode persists and remains at the selected value (Adaptive or Standard) after reopening the ANC tab.
